chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-5065 of 2024 (Muhammad Arif v. Government of Sindh and others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURES OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on Misc. No.22552/2024 2. For order on office objection No.2 3. For order on Misc. No.22553/2024 4. For order on Misc. No.22554/2024 5. For hearing of main case 14.10.2024 Mr. Raheel Ali Bhatti, advocate for the petitioner --------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4-5. It is the case of the petitioner that the private respondent is raising construction over the subject plot; the same to be declared illegal with the direction that it should not be transferred or leased out to anyone else and/or provided with a gas or electricity facility. The construction being illegal or otherwise is involving a factual controversy; the same could not be undertaken by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Nadir/PA*
